parts.description: Shared translation catalog crate used by daemon/UI-adjacent flows for English, French, Spanish, and German strings

Background daemon service with system tray, provider-aware JSON-RPC API, Jellyfin/Subsonic/OpenSubsonic adapters, SQLite storage, portable server identity, playlist editing, and configurable auto-fill
Tauri 2 desktop application with TypeScript/Vite frontend, Shoelace web components, server hub, playlist curation, tracks browse, auto-fill builder, and provider-neutral browse/sync UI

integration_points.details: UI sends JSON-RPC requests to daemon for server connection/management, provider-neutral browse, playlist editing, auto-fill pipeline preview/persistence, device management, sync, manifests, scrobbling, and transcoding
Image proxy — daemon fetches active-provider cover art with auth
Daemon communicates with Jellyfin, Subsonic, Navidrome, or OpenSubsonic servers for library data, downloads, cover art, scrobbling, and change detection
Daemon uses shared translation lookup for user-facing messages, notifications, and errors
